info.title: F1 Live Race Control Backend API
info.description: REST endpoints for OpenF1 meetings, sessions, and dashboard snapshots. Socket.io live and replay events are documented at `/async-docs`.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: OpenF1 meetings, sessions, and dashboard snapshots.

tags.name: Race
tags.description: Race overview page payloads and sub-resources.

tags.name: Drivers
tags.description: Driver lists and driver detail page payloads.

tags.name: Compare
tags.description: Two-driver lap and telemetry comparison payloads.

parameters.name: sessionName
parameters.description: Filter by OpenF1 session name, for example Race or Qualifying.

get.summary: Compare two drivers on one lap
Compare two drivers' telemetry on one lap

post.summary: Force refresh a session from OpenF1
